SELECT cutWWW(url) AS url_without_www FROM urls;
SELECT cutQueryString(url) AS url_without_query FROM urls;
SELECT cutFragment(url) AS url_without_fragment FROM urls;
SELECT cutQueryStringAndFragment(url) AS url_without_query_fragment FROM urls;
SELECT cutURLParameter(url, 'name') AS url_without_name FROM urls WHERE url LIKE '%name=%';
SELECT cutURLParameter(url, ['query', 'value']) AS url_without_multiple_params FROM urls WHERE url LIKE '%query=%' OR url LIKE '%value=%';
SELECT cutURLParameter(cutQueryString(url), 'query') AS url_without_query_param FROM urls;
SELECT url, cutQueryString(url) AS url_without_query, cutFragment(url) AS url_without_fragment FROM urls WHERE cutFragment(url) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT cutWWW(cutQueryString(cutFragment(url))) AS cleaned_url FROM urls;
CREATE TABLE url_transformations AS SELECT url, cutQueryString(url) AS url_without_query, cutFragment(url) AS url_without_fragment, cutWWW(url) AS url_without_www FROM urls;
SELECT * FROM url_transformations WHERE url_without_query LIKE 'http://%';
SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_urls, COUNT(cutQueryString(url)) AS total_urls_without_query FROM urls;
WITH (SELECT cutFragment(url) FROM urls) AS fragments, (SELECT cutWWW(url) FROM urls) AS wwws SELECT COUNT(*) FROM fragments, wwws;
